name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement setting out each party's obligations and the terms of a business partnership.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the partnership agreement takes effect.

fields.label: End Date
fields.help: The date the agreement expires (unless earlier terminated).

fields.label: Company Obligations
fields.help: Describe what Company is obligated to do under this partnership (e.g., provide product access, marketing support, referral fees).

fields.label: Partner Obligations
fields.help: Describe what Partner is obligated to do under this partnership (e.g., promote Company's products, generate leads, co-market).

fields.label: Fees
fields.help: The fee amount owed from one party to the other, if any (e.g., referral fee, revenue share amount).

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.help: How fees will be billed or invoiced (e.g., monthly invoice, milestone-based billing).

fields.label: Payment Schedule
fields.help: When payments are due (e.g., net 30 days after invoice, quarterly).

fields.label: Territory
fields.help: The geographic territory in which the trademark license is granted (e.g., Worldwide, United States).

fields.label: Brand Elements
fields.help: List the specific trademarks, logos, or other brand materials each party is licensed to use (describe which party provides which elements).

fields.label: Brand Guidelines
fields.help: Reference or URL for the licensor's brand usage guidelines, if any.

fields.label: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
fields.help: Do the parties have a separate Data Processing Agreement that governs personal data under this partnership?

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.help: The maximum total liability of each party for all claims (e.g., $50,000 or fees paid in the prior 12 months).

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.help: A higher liability cap that applies specifically to the Increased Claims listed below, if any.

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.help: List any claim types subject to the Increased Cap Amount rather than the General Cap Amount (e.g., IP infringement, data breach).

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.help: List any claim types not subject to any liability cap (e.g., gross negligence, willful misconduct, fraud).

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.help: Any additional warranties each party must comply with beyond those in Section 7 (e.g., compliance with specific regulations, security standards).

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The jurisdiction whose laws govern this agreement (e.g., State of Delaware, USA).

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts where disputes will be brought (e.g., courts of the State of Delaware, USA).
